reviews.comment:
Tuve mala experiencia . No pude abonar con ninguna aplicación. Tanto como serviclub y aplicaciones para abonar.. solo en efectivo . No poseen internet , y me bloquearon el internet de mí teléfono .. sospechosamente cuando salí de la estación de servicio.. recupere mí internet en mí celular y volvieron a funcionar las aplicaciones.. ya era tarde ..

(Translated by Google)
I had a bad experience. I couldn't pay with any app, either Serviclub or payment apps... cash only. They don't have internet, and they blocked my phone's internet... suspiciously when I left the gas station. I got my internet back on my phone and the apps started working again... it was too late.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCakl5QjFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la demora, la mala predisposicion de algun playero. No les andaba el wifi, no les andaba la aplicacion ypf, por lo tanto no pude acceder al descuento y los posnet  no funcionaban o no estaban en linea. Un desastre absoluto.

(Translated by Google)
The delays were a disaster, as was the poor attitude of some of the staff. Their Wi-Fi wasn't working, their YPF app wasn't working, so I couldn't access the discount, and the card readers were either not working or offline. An absolute disaster.

reviews.comment:
Se me rompio la moto (los amortiguadores) fui al lugar donde decia mecánica y les pregunte y me dijieron que  no hacian mecánica de moto pero me preguntaron que fue lo que paso y me ayudaron, hizo lo posible para conseguir los amortiguadores para mi moto, dejo de hacer las cosas que estaba haciendo para darme una mano, no me quizo cobrar nada, la verdad muy buena persona, hay muy poca gente asi como el que te ayuda sin esperar nada a cambio y lo hace de corazón,  me volvi ese mismo dia para capital un viaje de 6hs  con la moto gracias a racha y a su compañero.

(Translated by Google)
My motorcycle broke (the shock absorbers), I went to the place that said mechanics and I asked them and they told me that they didn't do motorcycle mechanics but they asked me what happened and they helped me, he did everything possible to get the shock absorbers for my motorcycle, he stopped doing the things he was doing to give me a hand, he didn't want to charge me anything, the truth is that he is a very good person, there are very few people like him who help you without expecting anything in return and do it from the heart, I returned that same day to the capital, a 6 hour trip on the motorcycle thanks to Racha and his partner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCOTVLNDh3RRAB
